commands.review_summary:
Adds Discord `slashCommandDeploy` modes, plugin-state-backed startup deploy fingerprints, legacy sidecar migration, serialized background deploys, and matching Discord docs/schema/metadata/tests.

PR surface: Source +353, Tests +337, Docs +7, Generated 0. Total +697 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source-level yes: feed the migration a `v2026.6.5`-style `{ hashes: { "global:reconcile": sha } }` cache and compare its imported value with the PR-head deployer key `app:<applicationId>:global:reconcile`; I did not run a mutating test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the Discord migration and regression tests; maintainer compatibility approval should follow after the repair.
